empty.title: No notes yet
empty.subtitle: Jot down anything useful before, during, or after the trip.
info.title: About Notes
info.content: A shared notepad for your group. Jot down packing reminders, restaurant recommendations, travel tips, or anything useful. Everyone in the trip can see and edit notes. Tap + to create your first note.
create.title: New Note
edit.title: Edit Note
field.title: Title
placeholder.title: e.g. Packing checklist
placeholder.description: Add details, links, or anything useful...
create.locked: New notes can't be added more than 2 weeks after the trip ended.
